# AI or Die
> Your AI team. Your infrastructure. Your control. We just build it.

## Company
- Name: AI or Die
- Website: https://aiordie.now
- Offices: Miami, FL and Seattle, WA
- Phone: (786) 998-9310

## What We Do
AI or Die is a consulting firm that deploys AI teams into client businesses.
We do not operate as a managed service.

Model:
1) DEPLOY — one-time build on client infrastructure
2) TRAIN — included handoff, runbooks, and team training
3) ADVISE — optional monthly advisory for edge cases

## Pricing
### Deployment (one-time)
- STARTER: $5,000 (1-2 agents)
- GROWTH: $10,000 (3-5 agents)
- SCALE: $15,000-$20,000 (6-10 agents)
- ENTERPRISE: Custom (10+ agents)

All deployment tiers include discovery, custom design, deployment on client infrastructure, training, runbook, and 5 post-deployment advisory hours.

### Advisory (optional monthly)
- LIGHT: $1,500/mo (4 hours)
- STANDARD: $2,500/mo (8 hours)
- PRIORITY: $4,000/mo (16 hours)

## Support Escalation
1. Ask your AI team (free)
2. Check your runbook (free)
3. Call AI or Die advisory (paid)

## Positioning
- We build it. You own it. You run it.
- Your platform hosts your agents.
- We never see your API keys.
- Cancel and keep everything.

## Client-paid Tools
Clients pay providers directly for:
- 1Password
- LLM API keys
- Hosting
- Discord or Telegram (recommended)
- Slack (supported)

## Contact
- Book: https://calendar.notion.so/meet/tomaszwojewoda/aod
- Phone: (786) 998-9310
